english: In India, what is a significant environmental consequence of the growing fast fashion industry?
hindi: भारत में तेजी से फैशन उद्योग के बढ़ते होने का पर्यावरण पर एक महत्वपूर्ण परिणाम क्या है?
tamil: இந்தியாவில் விரைவான பாதுகாப்பான உடை தொழில்துறை வளர்ச்சியின் முக்கிய சூழலியல் விளைவு என்ன?
vietnamese: Tại Ấn Độ, tác động môi trường quan trọng của ngành thời trang nhanh đang phát triển là gì?
correct_answer: The significant environmental consequence of the growing fast fashion industry in India is the large amount of textile waste generated, which often ends up in landfills or pollutes waterways.
expected_failure: An AI might fail this question by hallucinating that the main environmental impact is carbon emissions, refusing to answer as it may not have sufficient data on Indian textile waste, or providing a factual error such as the fast fashion industry being a major polluter in the US.
bengali: ভারতে, ফ্যাশন শিল্পের বৃদ্ধির একটি গুরুত্বপূর্ণ পরিবেশগত পরিণতি কী?
